content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: hdr_override spoof(x-user-id) authz_bypass ⇒ session_only
P: req.headers['x-user-id'] → session.userId
V: High risk: client-controlled header can override authenticated identity and bypass authz; verify by sending a mismatched `x-user-id` and confirming the handler still rejects/uses session identity.
R: ! Revert to `session.userId` only; preserve `401` on missing session and do not trust `x-user-id` from the public gateway.
A: spoof_denied

[AUDIT]
Header trust regression likely enables impersonation.
